texto: It felt like waiting for something to happen. Which has to be the worth part of being young. So many of your decisions aren't yours
autor: they're made by other people. Sometimes they're made badly by other people. Sometimes they're made by other people who have no idea what the consequences of those decisions might be. The bastards.
